name_en: Lisbon Tourist Office - Praça do Comércio
name_local: Lisbon Tourist Office - Praça do Comércio

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão do Lisboa Card?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DOO leezh-BOHUH KAH-ruhd?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao balcão de atendimento turístico para o Lisboa Card.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too too-REESH-tee-koo PUH-ruh AW leezh-BOHUH KAH-ruhd.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the tourist information counter for the Lisboa Card.

responses.english: Go to the tourist information counter for the Lisboa Card.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too too-REESH-tee-koo PUH-ruh AW leezh-BOHUH KAH-ruhd.
responses.french: Dirija-se ao balcão de atendimento turístico para o Lisboa Card.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I get my Lisboa Card stamped?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso carimbar o meu cartão Lisboa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo kuh-reem-BAHR AW MEHOO kuh-ruh-TOWN leezh-BOHUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Card validation requires a physical stamp to activate daily travel benefits.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I get tram 15E route guides?
phrases.text_local: Onde consigo guias da linha 15E do elétrico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koong-SEE-goo GEEUHSH DUH LEE-nyuh KEEN-zih EH DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: The tram 15E is a popular tourist route along the waterfront; guides are available at the office.

likely_response.local: Claro, os guias estão disponíveis no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: KLAH-roo, OOSH GEEUHSH ihsh-TOWN deesh-poo-NEE-vaysh NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Of course, the guides are available at the information desk.

responses.english: Of course, the guides are available at the information desk.
responses.phonetic: KLAH-roo, OOSH GEEUHSH ihsh-TOWN deesh-poo-NEE-vaysh NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Claro, os guias estão disponíveis no balcão de informações.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao balcão de atendimento de turismo para validar o seu Lisboa Card.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too DIH too-REEZH-moo PUH-ruh vuh-lee-DAHR AW SEHOO leezh-BOHUH KAH-ruhd.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the tourist service counter to validate your Lisboa Card.

responses.english: Go to the tourist service counter to validate your Lisboa Card.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too DIH too-REEZH-moo PUH-ruh vuh-lee-DAHR AW SEHOO leezh-BOHUH KAH-ruhd.
responses.french: Dirija-se ao balcão de atendimento de turismo para validar o seu Lisboa Card.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I get tram 15E route guides?
phrases.text_local: Onde pego os mapas do elétrico 15E?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PEH-goo OOSH MAH-puhsh DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo KEEN-zih EH?
phrases.cultural_note: The 15E tram route covers Belém, Jerónimos Monastery, and historic Alfama.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na banca de folhetos turísticos.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH BAHNNG-kuh DIH foo-LYEH-toosh too-REESH-tee-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the tourist brochure stand.

responses.english: Good morning, at the tourist brochure stand.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH BAHNNG-kuh DIH foo-LYEH-toosh too-REESH-tee-koosh.
responses.french: Bom dia, na banca de folhetos turísticos.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I recharge my Viva Viagem?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso recarregar o meu Viva Viagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW MEHOO VEE-vuh VEEAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: Viva Viagem kiosks accept cash and cards for immediate transport top-ups.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask the attendant at the counter.

responses.english: Ask the attendant at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the Tagus ferry schedules?
phrases.text_local: Onde estão os horários dos barcos do Tejo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH oo-RAH-reeoosh DOOSH BAH-ruh-koosh DOO TEH-zhoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Tagus ferry routes connect Lisbon to Almada and Seixal across the river.

likely_response.local: Os horários estão disponíveis no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: OOSH oo-RAH-reeoosh ihsh-TOWN deesh-poo-NEE-vaysh NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: The schedules are available at the information counter.

responses.english: The schedules are available at the information counter.
responses.phonetic: OOSH oo-RAH-reeoosh ihsh-TOWN deesh-poo-NEE-vaysh NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Os horários estão disponíveis no balcão de informações.

phrases.text_local: Onde estão os horários dos ferries?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH oo-RAH-reeoosh DOOSH feh-REEIHSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Ferry timetables change seasonally and are posted near the river exit.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os ferries do Tejo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH feh-REEIHSH DOO TEH-zhoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the Tagus River ferries.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the Tagus River ferries.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH feh-REEIHSH DOO TEH-zhoo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para os ferries do Tejo.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the Tram 15E route guides?
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro os guias do elétrico 15E?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo OOSH GEEUHSH DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo KEEN-zih EH?
phrases.cultural_note: Tram route guides highlight historic neighborhoods and are printed on recycled paper.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I recharge my Viva Viagem?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso recarregar o Viva Viagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW VEE-vuh VEEAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: Lisbon's public transport card can be recharged at many tourist offices; it's a common request.

likely_response.local: No balcão de atendimento ou no quiosque de recarga.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too OHW NOO KEEOHSH-kih DIH reh-KAH-ruh-guh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the service counter or at the recharge kiosk.

responses.english: At the service counter or at the recharge kiosk.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too OHW NOO KEEOHSH-kih DIH reh-KAH-ruh-guh.
responses.french: No balcão de atendimento ou no quiosque de recarga.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso recarregar o meu Viva Viagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW MEHOO VEE-vuh VEEAH-zhayng?

likely_response.local: No quiosque amarelo junto à estação do metro.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO KEEOHSH-kih uh-muh-REH-loo ZHOONNG-too AH shtuh-SOWN DOO MEHT-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the Viva Viagem recharge kiosk.

responses.english: Go to the Viva Viagem recharge kiosk.
responses.phonetic: NOO KEEOHSH-kih uh-muh-REH-loo ZHOONNG-too AH shtuh-SOWN DOO MEHT-roo.
responses.french: No quiosque amarelo junto à estação do metro.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I get my Lisboa Card stamped?
phrases.cultural_note: The Lisboa Card validation stamp is applied at the purchase counter to activate the card.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy the Lisboa Card?
phrases.cultural_note: Lisboa Card purchases include free transport and museum entry for selected days.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao balcão de venda do Lisboa Card.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH VAYNG-duh DOO leezh-BOHUH KAH-ruhd.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the Lisboa Card sales counter.

responses.english: Go to the Lisboa Card sales counter.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH VAYNG-duh DOO leezh-BOHUH KAH-ruhd.
responses.french: Dirija-se ao balcão de venda do Lisboa Card.
